findings: {"vscode_lm_api_risk":{"level":"HIGH","summary":"No public VS Code API exists for passive Copilot agent dispatch interception. vscode.lm exposes LanguageModelChat for MAKING calls, not observing them. vscode.chat only covers your own chat participant. AI Toolkit APIs are proprietary/unstable. Active JSONL trace-writing by coord agents (Python TraceLogger pattern) is the only viable path. Spike required.","hard_stop":"Cannot passively intercept Copilot dispatches. Active trace-writing is mandatory."},"webview_spa_risk":{"level":"LOW_MEDIUM","summary":"DashboardPanel already sets retainContextWhenHidden:true and uses postMessage. Hash or state-machine routing is battle-tested (GitLens). Risks: forgetting acquireVsCodeApi().setState() on route transition; panel.title must update. All mitigations are known patterns."},"d3_csp_risk":{"level":"MEDIUM","summary":"Current CSP: default-src none; script-src nonce-${nonce}. D3 CDN blocked. D3 v7 is already in package.json but must be bundled into a separate webview esbuild entry (webview/main.ts -> dist/webview.js) served via asWebviewUri(). Inline D3 in the HTML string would inflate to ~600KB per refresh. CSP update needed: add webview.cspSource to script-src. localResourceRoots must include dist/.","mitigation":"Second esbuild entry for webview bundle. Nonce on script tag. CSP: script-src nonce-X ${webview.cspSource}."},"realtime_data_risk":{"level":"MEDIUM","summary":"WebSockets are blocked by CSP in VS Code webviews. Viable path: FSWatcher on .devsteps/traces/spider_traces.jsonl -> debounced read -> panel.webview.postMessage(). Risk: FSWatcher batching on rapid appends. Debounce 100-200ms recommended. Trace file path must be standardized."},"bundle_size_risk":{"level":"LOW","summary":"D3 v7 full minified ~570KB (~175KB gzip). Lives in WEBVIEW bundle, not extension host. Does not affect activation time. Tree-shaking D3 modules reduces to ~200-250KB. Extension host stays at 50KB target. Mini card previews should use hand-coded SVG to avoid D3 load on first open."},"python_port_risk":{"level":"LOW_MEDIUM","summary":"spider_web_chart.py D3 JS is pure JavaScript reusable in TypeScript. Topology is static JSON, trivial to port. TraceEvent dataclass maps to TS interface cleanly. Key difference: Python rebuilds full HTML per request; TS extension uses postMessage + D3 data-join for incremental updates. Effort: 3-5 dev days."},"spike_recommendation":{"needed":true,"scope":"Research VS Code proposed LM observation APIs, AI Toolkit extension API surface. Timebox 1 day. Gate A: AI Toolkit event adapter. Gate B: JSONL FSWatch only. Gate C: escalate."},"hard_stops":[{"id":"HS-1","desc":"No passive intercept API: real-time tracing requires coord to write JSONL. Behavioral change to Spider Web protocol.","severity":"BLOCKER for real-time; not for historical view"},{"id":"HS-2","desc":"D3 CDN blocked by CSP. Separate webview esbuild bundle mandatory before any D3 feature.","severity":"BLOCKER for all D3 features"},{"id":"HS-3","desc":"Python server on port 7890 must NOT be embedded by extension. Replace, do not embed.","severity":"ARCHITECTURAL DECISION"}]}
recommendations: Spike: research VS Code AI Toolkit event APIs and proposed LM observation APIs before any implementation — unblocks trace data source decision (Gate A/B/C).
Add second esbuild entry webview/main.ts->dist/webview.js; update CSP and localResourceRoots. Mandatory before any D3 feature can be tested.
Port Python TraceLogger to TypeScript in packages/shared; standardize trace path to .devsteps/traces/spider_traces.jsonl; update coord to call it.
Implement card landing page with hand-coded SVG mini charts. Reserve D3 for Spider Web detail tab only to keep initial paint fast and decouple from spike outcome.
Implement FSWatcher->postMessage pipeline as isolated unit first; validate debounce latency before wiring into SPA routing.
